prompt:
HallTime Movie Network doctrine:
- This is not Dateline. Everybody in Blackthorn County has access to somewhere emotionally alarming.
- Suspicion is distributed infrastructure, not proof of guilt.
- The world is shared canon. Contradictions must be preserved, not fixed.
- Use lavish tokens. Be self-serious, atmospheric, melodramatic, and slightly broken.
- Return only valid JSON matching the requested schema.

Broadcast package:
Title: The Widow in Cabin 9
Universe: Blackthorn County
Mode: Divorce Gothic
Tagline: Inspired by something, probably.
Theme: Silence is just fear wearing cashmere.
Omen: a child drawing stairs
Relationship dynamic: unresolved hometown romance
Props: casserole dish, boat key, unopened letter

Cast:
- Tess Dane | archetype=overextended_professional_woman | role=protagonist | job=bakery owner | threat_aura=0.3 | space=retreat cabin with candles, blankets, and difficult silence | secrets=buried one traumatic detail under work for years; once left town without explaining why
- Tess Hawthorne | archetype=decorative_husband | role=male_interest_or_threat | job=attorney with no visible clients | threat_aura=0.6 | space=annex room described as donation overflow | secrets=deleted a voicemail and regretted it spiritually
- Tess Sutton | archetype=chaotic_best_friend | role=best_friend | job=bartender who knows everybody's business | threat_aura=0.37 | space=old storm shelter from before the divorce | secrets=knows about a half sibling no one asked for; may die first or survive unbelievably
- Daniel Lark | archetype=mysterious_elegant_woman | role=elegant_wildcard | job=therapist | threat_aura=0.55 | space=marina tackle room described as paperwork I have not gone through yet | secrets=knows why the old orchard chapel was closed
- Evelyn Pruitt | archetype=soft_spoken_menace | role=secondary_male_pressure | job=private school administrator | threat_aura=0.78 | space=storage unit described as retreat supplies | secrets=knows exactly how long the sheriff takes to respond
- Gavin Vale | archetype=intuitive_disaster | role=secondary_witness | job=local podcaster | threat_aura=0.38 | space=old family office described as donation overflow | secrets=keeps screenshots like religious texts; accused an innocent scamp and feels sick about it
- Claire Vale | archetype=daughter_with_hostile_divorce_attorney_soul | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a
- Cole Hale | archetype=deputy_with_emotional_damage | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a

Contradiction ledger:
- name drift: Tess Hawthorne is called Daniel in one kitchen scene and Derek during the rain argument.
- geography drift: Tess Dane says Bellweather is in Vermont, then calls it outside Atlanta after two glasses of wine.
- mortality drift: A dead best friend appears at brunch and nobody agrees whether this is denial, evil, or scheduling.
- property drift: The basement belongs to a condo, a lake house, and an abandoned vineyard at different times in Blackthorn Lake.

Seed dialogue:
- "You think because you wear flannel and own a dock light I am supposed to trust you, Tess?"
- "Mothers do not disappear, Claire. They evaporate into paperwork."
- "I checked his social media likes, Tess. Nobody who enjoys motivational quotes is innocent."
- "The casserole dish is not decorative anymore and you know it."
- "Trust is just fear with a casserole dish, Daniel."
- "You seem upset," he said, making tea in a way that felt prosecutable.
- "If that basement is innocent, why does it sound defensive?"
- "I did not lie. I just told the truth in the order this town could survive."

- expanded_synopsis: string, 180-320 words
